title: Engine Method Catalog
description: Schema for GET /api/engines/:id/methods. Any engine returns an array of these. GenomeHub renders UI from this schema without knowing what the engine does internally.

id.description: Unique method identifier. Used in POST /api/engines/:id/methods/:methodId

name.description: Human-readable method name for the UI

description.description: What this method does, shown below the name

async.description: If true, the engine returns 202 { job_id } instead of streaming the result immediately. GenomeHub polls GET /api/jobs/:job_id for progress, then fetches GET /api/jobs/:job_id/stream on completion. Default false.

name.description: Parameter key sent in the request body

type.description: file = GenomeHub uploads a file to the engine before calling the method. string = plain value passed through as-is.

description.description: Shown as label or help text

default.description: Default value for optional string params. Shown as placeholder. Omitted if no default.

accept.description: For file params: list of accepted formats to filter the file picker. e.g. ["json", "bed", "bigwig"]. Omit to accept any file.

type.description: Always file. GenomeHub downloads the result and stores it.

examples.name: Spatial Overlay
examples.description: Spatial join of two region sets with tag merge.

parameters.name: name_tag
parameters.description: Tag key for promoted reference region name

returns.description: Regions with merged tags from both inputs

examples.name: Feature Annotation
examples.description: Annotate regions against a feature map. Adds overlap, offset, and relative position.

examples.name: CRISPR Guide Design
examples.description: Design and score CRISPR guides for a genome.
